optionCount.description: Total choices shown per question (correct + distractors)

imageCandidates.description: Image paths extracted from source PDFs, offered in the pin editor

topic.description: Study area used in the weak-area report, e.g. 'Skull', 'Endocrine — Pituitary'

prompt.description: mc: required question text. pin: optional, defaults to 'What structure is marked?'

options.description: mc only: all choices including the correct one

image.description: pin only: path relative to the quiz folder, e.g. images/skull_anterior.jpg

pin.description: pin only: normalized 0-1 coordinates on the image

distractorPool.description: pin only, optional: preferred distractors; engine falls back to same-image then same-topic answers
